projectDescription: An open-source, multi-tenant platform for self-building knowledge graphs powered by AI agents, a strongly-typed entity system, and a functional graph query language.
keyFeatures: Self-building knowledge graph that integrates data from public internet and private sources via AI agents
Strongly-typed entity and type system based on the Block Protocol type system
Bi-temporal graph versioning with decision time and transaction time axes
HashQL — typed, functional traversal language for querying the graph
AI-powered workflows and flows using Temporal for durable execution
Browser plugin for capturing structured data from any web page
REST Graph API with OpenAPI specification and structural queries
MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers for Linear, Notion, and GitHub integrations
Visual type editor and entity browser for non-technical users
publicApiSurface: POST /entities/query — Structural entity queries with graphResolveDepths
hash-graph CLI: server, migrate, type-fetcher subcommands
